name: NORTECH SYSTEMS INC
summary: Nortech Systems Incorporated, organized in 1990 and headquartered in Maple Grove, Minnesota, is a contract manufacturer providing engineering design and manufacturing solutions for complex electromedical devices, electromechanical systems, assemblies, and components. The company offers wire and cable assemblies, printed circuit board assemblies, complex higher-level assemblies, and box builds for Medical Device, Medical Imaging, Aerospace and Defense, and Industrial OEM customers, with operations in Minnesota, Monterrey Mexico, and Suzhou China.

products.name: Wire and Cable Assemblies
products.description: Custom wire and cable assemblies including fiber-optic interconnect technologies for medical, defense, and industrial customers.

products.name: Printed Circuit Board Assemblies
products.description: Complex PCB assemblies manufactured to customer unique design specifications.

products.name: Complex Higher-Level Assemblies and Box Builds
products.description: Complete turnkey electromechanical and electromedical system assemblies for OEM customers.

products.name: Engineering Design and Prototyping Services
products.description: Design for manufacturing support, testing, prototyping, and project management services to accelerate customer programs to production.

products.name: Supply Chain Management
products.description: Customer and supplier-managed inventory solutions and global supply chain risk management.

products.name: Post-Market Services
products.description: Post-production support services for customers across the product life cycle.
